prompt: The Stack.peek() call throws EmptyStackException even though elements were pushed. What is the bug?
choices: Stack.push() does not add elements correctly in a loop
The while loop pops all elements before peek() is called; the stack is empty when peek() executes
Stack.peek() requires the stack to have more than one element
peek() and pop() cannot be used on the same Stack instance
explanation: The while loop removes all 5 elements with pop(). When peek() is called afterward the stack is empty, so EmptyStackException is thrown. Fix: either call peek() inside the loop before popping, or call peek() before the loop.
